values.name: Failover

values.name: FailoverCommit
values.description: Commits the failover for resources that require an explicit commit after recovery.

values.name: Reprotect
values.description: Performs re-protection or configuration changes for resources that have failed over, as required.

values.name: TestFailover
values.description: Initiates a test failover process for qualified resources and those that support test failover.

values.name: TestFailoverCleanup
values.description: Cleans up resources and configurations created during a test failover, as required.

values.description: Operation has completed but ran into some warning state.

values.description: Operation has completed but ran into some validation error state.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Operation has completed but ran into some error state.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Operation has been canceled by the user.
